body.gate: deferred — come back later when Igor is further along
body.title: [sprint] Igor invokes coding subagent — MCP tool or bus message design
body.description:
The CC minion pattern (worktree Agent for code edits) should eventually be invocable by Igor too — a shared coding subagent both CC and Igor can dispatch. Design the mechanism: new MCP tool wrapping Agent()? a bus message format? a cc_send payload shape? Decision D-shared-coding-subagent-2026-05-05.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in sprint
**Design rules:** igor-constraints (Igor-coding-last: do not sprint until all other tickets closed)
**Scope boundary:** IN: design only — what protocol Igor uses to invoke a coding subagent and get back a commit hash. OUT: implementation (separate ticket after design).
**Test plan:** no tests until design is settled
**Pass condition:** design doc at lab/design_docs/coding-subagent-igor-path.md with chosen mechanism, message format, and rollback story.
